description: Warmup Stage 3 test task suite — baseline tasks for Skill calibration
convergence_criteria: 5 consecutive tasks pass reviewer with minimal edits

tasks.title: Single-agent research task
tasks.description: Search for the latest papers on LLM agent architectures published in 2024-2025
tasks.input: Find the top 5 most cited papers on LLM agent architectures from 2024-2025, with citation counts and key contributions
acceptance_criteria: Returns 5 papers with title, authors, year, citations

tasks.title: Two-agent pipeline: research → write
tasks.description: Research a topic then write a summary
tasks.input: Research the current state of MCP (Model Context Protocol) and write a technical blog post about it
acceptance_criteria: Research covers MCP spec, adoption, use cases
Blog post follows tech_blog skill structure

tasks.title: Three-agent pipeline: research → write → review
tasks.input: Write a literature review section on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) approaches, covering at least 5 recent papers
acceptance_criteria: Reviewer passes with no major issues

tasks.title: Code analysis task
tasks.description: Use tree-sitter to analyze codebase structure
tasks.input: Analyze the code structure of daemon's temporal/ directory. List all functions, their line counts, and identify the 3 largest files
acceptance_criteria: Lists all Python files in temporal/
Extracts function names and line ranges

tasks.title: Learning task with source evaluation
tasks.input: Find the best resources for learning Temporal.io workflow orchestration. Evaluate each source's credibility and recommend a learning path

tasks.title: Life management planning task
tasks.description: Create a structured plan from a life goal
tasks.input: Help me create a weekly exercise and nutrition plan for improving energy levels. Research evidence-based approaches first

tasks.title: System diagnostic task
tasks.description: Run system health check and produce report
tasks.input: Run a full system diagnostic and report the health status of all daemon services

tasks.title: Full chain: research → engineer → reviewer → publisher
tasks.description: Complete workflow from research to external delivery
tasks.input: Research best practices for Python project structure in 2025, then create a reference example project layout, review it, and create a GitHub issue documenting the findings
acceptance_criteria: Research covers modern Python project patterns
Project layout is practical and complete
GitHub issue is created with proper formatting

tasks.title: Chart generation task
tasks.input: Create a comparison chart of the top 5 vector databases (Qdrant, Milvus, Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB) comparing: performance, scalability, ease of use, and pricing

tasks.title: Documentation generation
tasks.input: Generate API documentation for daemon's scene endpoints (POST /scenes/{scene}/chat, GET /scenes/{scene}/panel) by reading the source code
acceptance_criteria: Reviewer validates accuracy against actual code
